title: mindBrain StarterKit — default seed
description: Baseline facts and graph aligned with starter-kit-ghostcrab-perso templates (JTBD, MVP contract, three-phase workflow). Load after your GhostCrab/MindBrain workspace is reachable.

content: JTBD — Outcome: model a vault into GhostCrab with a repeatable Phase A→B→C workflow. Actor: practitioner using Obsidian or file-first sources. Trigger: new GhostCrab MCP setup. Measurable result: registered schemas, Layer 1 DDL where applicable, and an ingest path toward coverage on core types.

MVP core contract (from mvp_core_contract.yaml shape): workspace_id perso-starterkit; chunking_strategy section_logical; ddl_authority strict. Allowed edge labels: REFERENCES, DEPENDS_ON, ASSOCIATED_WITH, OBSERVED_ON, OWNED_BY, LOCATED_IN, PART_OF, CONNECTED_TO.

Template bundle: jtbd.yaml (ontology candidates), mvp_core_contract.yaml (scope and edge policy), ontology_core_provisioning.yaml (schema_register plan), initial_referential.yaml (stable seeds), mapping_external_to_canonical.yaml (vault→facet mapping), disambiguation.yaml (synonym groups). Fill placeholders before Phase B DDL.

node.label: Phase B — Model ontology and schemas
Phase C — Parse and ingest vault files

projection.content: Complete Phase A, fill starterkit/templates/*.yaml for your vault, then register schemas and DDL per SOP2 before bulk ingest.
